blockers.description: 8 stale locked worktrees in .git/worktrees/ block new `git worktree add` calls (config.lock timeout)
blockers.workaround: Prune with `git worktree prune` and/or remove lockfiles: `rm -rf .git/worktrees/agent-*/locked` then `git worktree prune`

decisions.decision: Stashed pre-existing uncommitted 06-03 changes as stash@{0}
decisions.rationale: Worktree agent produced canonical 06-03 output; old interrupted run was superseded and would have blocked the merge

next_action: Clean up stale worktrees, then spawn gsd-executor for plan 06-05 with EXPECTED_BASE = current HEAD (97fdda0 at pause time)
